steps.assistant_text: rmonMain dispatch loop (kernel_018_d, -O1). The target's dead s0=0 (move s0,zero before the infinite loop, callee-saved, never read) is recovered with 'register s32 phantom;' declared FIRST + a late 'phantom=0;' assignment (register-class locals aren't DCE'd at -O1; declaring phantom before sp20 pins sp20 to the high stack slot 0x20 matching target). Body is byte-exact; the 7-nop dead-epilogue pad before the unreachable epilogue is the IDO '.align 5' directive after the loop-back 'b', reproduced exactly by the IDO-direct matching build path. .text byte-identical to expected; full make clean && make produces a ROM byte-identical to baserom (cmp clean).

metadata.verification: Per-instruction disasm of build/src/kernel/kernel_018_d.c.o vs expected/.o: 0 diffs. .text sections byte-identical (704 bytes). Full 'make clean && make' -> ROM OK byte-identical to baserom (cmp clean). objdiff/report fuzzy reads 94% due to the as1 dead-epilogue nop-pad scoring on the non_matching build path (known dual-build artifact); byte-verify of build vs expected .o passes.
